calibration.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only summary. Ground-truth labels may be used to audit candidate coverage, but candidate diagnostics do not calibrate or mutate predictions.

target_prefix.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only summary. Ground-truth labels may be used to audit candidate coverage, but candidate diagnostics do not calibrate or mutate predictions.

baseline.claim_boundary: Prediction-only stratified train-heldout calibration sweep from the 320k state-context masked-diffusion checkpoint; no target-label calibration and not G005 completion evidence unless followed by full-corpus promotion/audits.

family_non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Family budgets are calibrated on held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only.

non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Calibration uses held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only.

retrieval_action_prior.claim_boundary: Retrieval index uses fit/train rows only as a video/action-token denoising prior; target labels are never indexed.

claim_boundary: Probe comparison only; no G005 completion claim and no target-label calibration.

calibration.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only summary. Ground-truth labels may be used to audit candidate coverage, but candidate diagnostics do not calibrate or mutate predictions.

target_prefix.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only summary. Ground-truth labels may be used to audit candidate coverage, but candidate diagnostics do not calibrate or mutate predictions.

candidate_token_prior.claim_boundary: Train-fit action-token prior correction only. Target/eval labels are never used; unseen-in-fit tokens receive a fixed neutral/suppression weight rather than an inverse-frequency boost.

incumbent.claim_boundary: Prediction-only stratified train-heldout calibration sweep from the 320k state-context masked-diffusion checkpoint; no target-label calibration and not G005 completion evidence unless followed by full-corpus promotion/audits.

family_non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Family budgets are calibrated on held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only.

non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Calibration uses held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only.

retrieval_action_prior.claim_boundary: Retrieval index uses fit/train rows only as a video/action-token denoising prior; target labels are never indexed.

next_candidate: Use recipe-preserving temporal source-offset candidate aggregation and inference-only vectorized/BF16/tensorized prediction to test whether neighboring masked action offsets recover keyboard timing without target-label calibration.

calibration.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only summary. Ground-truth labels may be used to audit candidate coverage, but candidate diagnostics do not calibrate or mutate predictions.

probe.claim_boundary: Prediction-only stratified train-heldout calibration sweep from the 320k state-context masked-diffusion checkpoint; no target-label calibration and not G005 completion evidence unless followed by full-corpus promotion/audits.

family_non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Family budgets are calibrated on held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only.

retrieval_action_prior.claim_boundary: Retrieval index uses fit/train rows only as a video/action-token denoising prior; target labels are never indexed.

rationale: Train-heldout keyboard confidence reranker improved calibration exact-candidate rank but lowered heldout keyboard key accuracy and still failed keyboard, mouse-button accuracy, and mouse-move Pearson paper targets. It remains nonterminal negative evidence only.
